text: Mainly fine. Force 5 to 6 easterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 4 to 5 easterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Mainly fine. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Mainly fine. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Mist later. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Mist in the morning and at night. Force 2 to 3 southeasterly winds.
